name: Do I really need a lawyer for my work machine injury?
description: Yes, boosts payout, handles denials—no fee unless win[4].

mainEntity.name: Do I really need a lawyer for my work machine injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, boosts payout, handles denials—no fee unless win[4].
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, to maximize benefits and fight denials.** Insurers lowball; attorneys get 20-30% more on average[4]. Free consults common. **Key factors:** Complex third-parties, denials. **Practical guidance:** Hire early; no upfront fees. Essential in Utah for causation fights[1].
